title: Renaissance Core
description: Core mod for Thaumic Renaissance Modpack.
body:
Renaissance core is a thaumcraft addon, also core of my modpack ThaumicRenaissanceKedition.

this mod added:


Bubble wrap golem, a golem immune "stuck in wall" damage.

You now can behead pech's head by using ReForbidden Magic's Skull axe item, those skull can use to craft golem.

Arcane cleansing dust, a dust can clear crucible instantly without any pollution, but no output also.
